source: Amazon Seller Central — FBA Orders (real), Manage Inventory (real), Business Reports session data (real). Campaign Manager inaccessible (advertising.amazon.com blocked).
status: REAL — FBA Orders confirm 5 orders in 7-day window (Apr 13-19). NEW: Mallory Apr 18 fountain $49.99 payment complete. BSR 81,677 — NEW ALL-TIME BEST. Amazon's Choice badge sustained.

highlights.bsr_breakthrough: 81,677 — NEW RECORD. Was 105,671 on Apr 17 (-23,994 improvement in 2 days). Sub-82K for the first time ever.
highlights.new_order_apr18: Mallory, Order 114-0094253-6041057, Apr 18 at 5:05 AM PDT, B0DJHQVJYF, $49.99, Payment complete.
highlights.today_apr19: 0 orders as of 10:42 PM PDT. Day is effectively complete.
highlights.sessions_surge: 397 sessions in 7-day window (business reports) — up from ~72 estimated pre-badge. Amazon's Choice badge driving ~7x session volume increase.
highlights.gap_note: No SC_Data file was created for 2026-04-18 (data gap). This file covers Apr 19 with full order context.

business_reports._note: Revenue and units from real FBA Orders. Sessions from Business Reports Detail Page by Child Item (7-day default). Note: 'Data from 4/19/2026 may not be fully available yet' shown on page — Apr 19 data is partial.
business_reports._sessions_note: 397 sessions for fountain (B0DJHQVJYF) in 7-day window per Business Reports. Significant jump from ~72 estimated on Apr 17 — Amazon's Choice badge on 'wireless cat water fountain' (18,100 SV) driving massive organic traffic increase.
business_reports._revenue_calc: Bundle Jerry $64.99 + Ruth $49.99 + Jennifer $49.99 + Mallory $49.99 = $214.96 (Dee Apr 12 fell outside 7-day window)
business_reports._cvr_note: 4 fountain units / 397 sessions = 1.01%. CVR temporarily depressed as badge drives high traffic volume surge. Historical CVR was 4-5.5% at lower session volumes. Expect CVR to stabilize at 3-5% as traffic normalizes.

B0DJHQVJYF._revenue_note: Ruth $49.99 + Jennifer $49.99 + Mallory $49.99 + Jerry bundle component $46.42 = $196.39
B0DJHQVJYF._note: 3 standalone ($149.97) + 1 bundle component ($46.42). BSR driven to 81,677 — best ever.

B0FWXJ1GKT._note: 1 filter unit as bundle component (Jerry Apr 15). No standalone filter sale this week.

B0GMDM6CG2._note: 1 bundle sale Apr 15 (Jerry). Virtual bundle uses component inventory.

business_reports_30day._note: Revenue from Manage Inventory 30-day sales display (real). Units estimated from revenue. 2 March fountain sales (~$103.88 worth) rolled off the window; Mallory Apr 18 (+$49.99) added.
business_reports_30day._sessions_note: Estimated. 397 confirmed 7-day sessions. Prior 23 days estimated at ~4/day pre-badge = ~92 sessions. Total ~490.
business_reports_30day._units_note: Estimated: ~10 fountain + ~6 filter (5 standalone + 1 bundle) + 1 bundle = ~17 total ASIN-level units
business_reports_30day._revenue_note: Manage Inventory: Fountain ~$496 + Filter ~$118 + Bundle $64.99 = $678.99. Down from $714.88 on Apr 17 as 2 March sales (~$103.88) dropped off and Mallory (+$49.99) was added.

B0FWXJ1GKT._revenue_source: real — Manage Inventory 30-day display ($118 shown, includes bundle component $18.57)

sales_today._interpretation: No sales on Apr 19. Day effectively complete at 10:42 PM PDT. Amazon's Choice badge is sustaining BSR momentum — BSR 81,677 reflects cumulative velocity including Mallory's Apr 18 order.
sales_today._context: Rest day expected. Amazon's Choice drives sessions not necessarily daily sales. BSR held at new record low of 81,677 despite 0 sales today.

sales_apr18._note: This is the first confirmed sale after the Amazon's Choice badge launched Apr 17. Came in early morning Apr 18.

fba_orders_detail._source: FBA Orders page scraped ~10:42 PM PDT Apr 19

orders._note: Was 'pending' in Apr 17 data — now confirmed payment complete. Buyer name: Ruth.

campaign_manager._source: Victor opened Campaign Manager targeting view Apr 19 ~11:18 PM PDT, filtered to Enabled+Impressions>0. Date range shown: Mar 20 - Apr 19, 2026.
campaign_manager._note: 30-day totals are REAL (scraped from targeting view footer). 7-day breakdown is UNAVAILABLE — Campaign Manager does not expose a 7-day window without manual date filter change. ACoS displayed is the real 30-day average.
campaign_manager._acos_note: Real 30-day ACoS across all 6 enabled targets with impressions. Shown on ACoS card as the best available real value. Do not interpret as a 7-day figure.
campaign_manager._7day_note: Not available. Only 30-day totals were captured from the targeting view.

enabled_targets_30day.verdict: WINNER — 75% of all PPC orders. Reduce bid 25%.

fba_inventory._source: Manage Inventory page scraped ~10:42 PM PDT Apr 19

fountain._bsr_source: real — Manage Inventory page, scraped tonight
fountain._bsr_note: BSR 81,677 — NEW ALL-TIME BEST. Was 105,671 on Apr 17 (-23,994 in 2 days). First time sub-82K. Amazon's Choice badge + Mallory Apr 18 purchase driving continued BSR improvement even on 0-sale Apr 19.
fountain._velocity_note: ~10 units / 30 days = 0.33/day (down from 0.37 on Apr 17 as 2 older March sales dropped from window). 7-day velocity = 4/7 = 0.57/day — much better indicator of current trend with Amazon's Choice badge.
fountain._inventory_note: 374 units. +1 vs Apr 17's 373. Mallory's Apr 18 order should have reduced by 1 (373 → 372), so the +2 vs expected suggests 1 inventory reconciliation or inbound unit was processed. Net: still heavily overstocked.

amazon_choice._note: Badge sustained through 2 days including a 0-sale day (Apr 19). BSR improvement from 105K to 81K while holding badge confirms the badge is helping organic velocity. At 81,677 BSR, sub-80K is now achievable with 1-2 more sales.
